title: dombeya lucida subsp. lucida
intro: Dombeya lucida subsp. lucida, also known as the White Pear or Pink Wild Pear, is a species of flowering plant in the family Malvaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant's health benefits include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce pain and inflammation, and even exhibit antimicrobial activity. In traditional herbal preparations, Dombeya lucida subsp. lucida is often made into a decoction or tea to harness its medicinal properties.
